layers.title: Layer 1 — Core Engineering & Systems (The 2013-2030 Bridge)
layers.description: Absolute mastery of the metal, the network, and the browser. No black boxes.

items.title: Rust Mastery
items.notes: Ownership, Lifetimes, Fearless Concurrency, Macros, Unsafe Rust, FFI (C/C++ integration)

items.title: Python (Advanced) & C++
items.notes: Python: Asyncio, GIL bypass, C-extensions. C++: Pointers, Memory Management, SIMD, CMake.

items.title: JS/TS & V8 Internals
items.notes: Event Loop, Micro/Macro-tasks, JIT Compilation, Garbage Collection, ASTs

items.title: Advanced Web Protocols
items.notes: HTTP/2 & HTTP/3 (QUIC), WebSockets, WebRTC, gRPC, GraphQL, SSE (Server-Sent Events), Webhooks

items.title: Deep Browser APIs
items.notes: Shadow DOM, Service Workers, Web Workers, IndexedDB, Canvas/WebGL, WebGPU, WebAssembly (Wasm)

items.title: Auth & Web Security
items.notes: JWT, OAuth 2.0, OIDC, CORS, CSRF, XSS, Content Security Policy (CSP), Rate Limiting

items.title: Infrastructure & Scaling
items.notes: Linux Kernel (eBPF, namespaces, cgroups), Docker, Kubernetes (K8s), Terraform, Nginx/HAProxy

items.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
items.notes: Arrays, HashMaps, Two Pointers, Sliding Window, Stacks, Binary Search, Graph Traversals (BFS/DFS), Dynamic Programming, Tries, Disjoint Sets

layers.title: Layer 2 — Mathematics & ML Foundations
layers.description: Understanding the calculus of reality before predicting it.

items.title: Linear Algebra
items.notes: Vectors, Matrices, Eigenvalues/Vectors, SVD, PCA, Tensor operations

items.title: Multivariable Calculus
items.notes: Partial Derivatives, Gradients, Jacobians, Hessians, Chain Rule (for Backprop)

items.title: Probability & Statistics
items.notes: Bayes' Theorem, Distributions, Hypothesis Testing, Maximum Likelihood Estimation, Information Theory (Entropy, KL Divergence)

items.title: Classical ML
items.notes: Linear/Logistic Regression, SVMs, Random Forests, Gradient Boosting (XGBoost, LightGBM)

items.title: ML Theory
items.notes: Bias-Variance Tradeoff, Regularization (L1/L2), Cross-Validation, Loss Functions

items.title: Data Engineering & Tools
items.notes: NumPy, Pandas, Polars (Rust), Scikit-learn, Ray, Apache Spark, Kafka pipelines

layers.title: Layer 3 — Deep Learning & Modern AI Architectures
layers.description: Building and training the brains of 2030.

items.title: Neural Network Internals
items.notes: Perceptrons, Activation Functions, Optimizers (Adam, AdamW), Dropout, Batch Norm

items.title: Transformer Architectures
items.notes: Self-Attention, Multi-Head Attention, Positional Encoding, BERT, GPT-n, MoE (Mixture of Experts)

items.title: Generative AI
items.notes: Diffusion Models (Stable Diffusion, Flux), VAEs, GANs, Multimodal Models (Vision-Language)

items.title: RL & Alignment
items.notes: Reinforcement Learning (PPO), RLHF (Human Feedback), DPO (Direct Preference Optimization)

items.title: Agentic AI & RAG
items.notes: Vector DBs (Pinecone, Qdrant), Advanced RAG, ReAct, Plan-and-Solve, Tool Calling / Function Calling

items.title: DL Frameworks
items.notes: PyTorch (Internals, Autograd), JAX (XLA compilation), TensorFlow, HuggingFace, vLLM, TensorRT

layers.title: Layer 4 — Web3, Blockchain & Decentralized Systems
layers.description: Engineering trustless, immutable, and uncensorable protocols.

items.title: Ethereum & EVM Deep Dive
items.notes: State Trie, Memory vs Storage vs Calldata, Gas Optimization, Opcode analysis, RPC internals

items.title: Solidity & Smart Contract Security
items.notes: Reentrancy, Front-running, MEV (Miner Extractable Value), Auditing tools (Slither, Foundry)

items.title: Layer 2 & Scaling Solutions
items.notes: Optimistic Rollups (Arbitrum), ZK-Rollups (StarkNet, zkSync), Data Availability layers (Celestia)

items.title: Alternative VMs & Rust Chains
items.notes: Solana (Sealevel, Anchor), Polkadot (Substrate), CosmWasm, MoveVM

items.title: DApp Architecture
items.notes: Ethers.js/Viem, WalletConnect, IPFS/Arweave, The Graph (Subgraphs), Account Abstraction (ERC-4337)

items.title: DeFi Primitives
items.notes: AMMs (Uniswap V2/V3), Lending Pools (Aave), Flash Loans, Oracles (Chainlink)

layers.title: Layer 5 — AI x Web3 (The Frontier)
layers.description: Where verifiable compute meets artificial intelligence.

items.title: Zero-Knowledge Machine Learning (ZK-ML)
items.notes: Proving inference on-chain, SNARKs/STARKs for neural networks, EZKL

items.title: Decentralized Compute & Training
items.notes: Gensyn, Akash, Render, Bittensor (Subnets, incentives for intelligence)

items.title: Privacy-Preserving AI
items.notes: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs), Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE), Multi-Party Computation (MPC)

items.title: AI Oracles & Agents
items.notes: AI-driven DAO governance, On-chain fraud detection, Autonomous trading agents managing treasuries

milestones.title: Web Core: Real-time collaborative canvas (WebSockets + Canvas API)
AI: Full-stack RAG application with custom vector search
Web3: MEV Searcher / Arbitrage Bot (Rust + EVM)
AI+Web3: ZK-ML DApp (Prove you ran a model without revealing inputs)
Capstone: Autonomous On-Chain Agent with Tool Use & Wallet

mlops_devops.title: CI/CD & Infrastructure as Code
mlops_devops.notes: GitHub Actions, Terraform, Ansible, Prometheus, Grafana

mlops_devops.title: ML Lifecycle Management
mlops_devops.notes: MLflow, Weights & Biases, Model Registries, Feature Stores, Data Drift detection

mlops_devops.title: High-Performance Serving
mlops_devops.notes: Triton Inference Server, TensorRT, vLLM, continuous batching, quantization (AWQ, GPTQ)
